summary: Planning only; used the hydrated preflight artifact as live state for this inventory shard and classified each listed open PR independently. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are allowed for this job. Validator marked #91222 security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central security handling without affecting unrelated non-security classifications.
